name: InnoCentive — outside-in open innovation as-a-service
description: The connector platform that runs outside-in open innovation as-a-service for many seekers. One BMC capturing the multi-sided structure: seekers (problem-posting companies) on one side, solvers (independent scientists worldwide) on the other, the platform aggregating and matching. Deliberately tagged with both `multi-sided-platforms` and `open-business-models / outside-in` — the two patterns overlap structurally for connector platforms, and the case is the canonical worked example.
